prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about antibiotic spectrum than social media does.
Context visual: Antibiotic spectrum refers to the range of bacteria an antibiotic can affect.
Escalation visual: Broad-spectrum antibiotics target many bacteria, but narrow-spectrum ones zero in on specific types. Why does it matter?
Evidence visual: Overusing broad-spectrum antibiotics can lead to resistance. This could make future infections harder to treat.
